pull_request.title: http-client-java, support clientRequired as Java clientOption
pull_request.body:
add `clientRequired` client option for java

it can also be used to set required property to optional.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+---
+changeKind: feature
+packages:
+  - "@typespec/http-client-java"
+---
+
+Add clientRequired clientOption for Java emitter
